entry.content:
56,42.44.
7 in Titulaturen.
AGH 98,23s.Or.39,124,12;gera G1.bv
Koningen d'era 1c;s.ER 150;ursan,usumgal q
354f.d sagamu Stn.c) q.ta maharim u.a.als Titel
s.ER 228.Denom.gitbulu mit muqtablu.

references.ref: AfO 8, 198, 30. d qabla, qabaltu, qabltu, qablu. NB.nA ADB 1 II 39. 43

entry.content: q. ali Takulttu 124, 117; Sn. 102, 90; 154, 15; s. VAB 7, 493. 826; (ina) q. bite, uqarim(Flur)-ma Or. 21, 130 oft; 137, 15; ABL 910 Rs. 6. c) mB sa q. GbN AKA 135, 16; s. jB AfO 20, 90, 38; ina qab-lu, qa-bal (|| sab(-sab-ba)) sadai ASKT 127, 42. 44. d) m/jB ina, sa q./qa-bal tamti (Meer), FN AfO 18, 344, 25; 351, 41; Tn. II 66. 68f.; AKA 200, 32; Sg. Wi. 225a; Sn. 35, 65; Ash. Nin. B I 10; $ 57, 7. nB ina q. LN ABL 1241, 18. c) jB (ina) q. same, Sternbild ACh. Sin 3, 16; Ad. 19, 52; 12-15 p; s. RMA p. 128b; math. MCT 141, 16. f) nA ina q. darin ABL 12 Rs. 4. g) jB ein Feld (ist) qa-bal sumi(Name)-ka (GN) K. 2523 Rs. 6. 8. 5) zeitl. a) a.A i-qa-ab-li harranim (Reise) EL 97, 5. b) Am., Ug. ina q[a]/qa-bal mu5i (Nacht) VAB 2, 29, 85; Ugar. 5, 72, 6. jB ina q. umi zB ACh. Sam. 19, 4; Ad. 6, 8; 23, 3; LAdv. qab-lu umi BWL 136, 178. d) gerrn I 4a. c) ina q./qa-bal q tiduki, tamharri (Schlacht) Tigl. III. 12, 65; Sn. 32, 5; 46, 18; Asb. AX 4; B V 45; ultu q. tamharri AfO 8, 198, 30. d qabla, qabaltu, qabltu, qablu. NB.nA ADB 1 II 39. 43; AR 373, 4; 445, 6. 16; ABL 574 p liest qab-lu/i (Pl qab-late) Hieig!

mB qututru 1. mA babu (Tor) qa-ab-li-u AOB 98, 7. jB ersetu/u (Erde) qab/qa-ab-li-tu/tum/ti s. Atr. 193a. Sama (Himmel) q.ti/tum TuL 33, 31; AfO 19, 110, 21. spB q a&kutu 2; (Balken) I qab- lu-u VS 6, 148, 3. b) aB math. qtalL qa-ab-lu-u MCT 44/5, 3; s. 16; qa-ab-li-a-am 17. Rs. 7. c) jB v Pflug- rind qab-lu-u MSL 8/1, 42, 289. d) mittl. Waagbal- ken: gi-s-erin-GAB, -LUL-bi= qab-lu-u 6, 60, 109 f. aB giS.ERiN.GAB UET 5, 119, 18 dazu? e) v Mittelfinger: q ubana q[a-ab-li-[tum] (|| muru -ba) MSL 9, 69, 25. f) v Lungen- u Leberteilen: uban la&i(m) qa-ab-li-tum ARM 5, 65, 34; q. YOS 10, 39, 5; s. Bab. 2, 259, 22. jB ubana q. zB PRT' S. 168; AGSS. 315f.; s. TU 5, 52 u p. q pitura q.u CT 20, 43, 38—40; aB ina serim qa-ab-li-i RA 38, 86, 15. 2) zeitl. nB q.ti m. Untersuchung PRT 4 Rs. 10. 3) infigirt: q.u MSL 3, 57, 10. 4) spB q.u Mittelfwert (?) s. ACT p. 486b. 5) v Mittelqualitat: aAK qab/qa-ab-li-um s. MAD 3, 224. aA qutana qa-ab-li-u-tum CCT 2, 46 a 8;

references.ref: RA 46, 88ff. p. jB qab-lu la ma
RA 11, 113, 18 u D. mB q šanina ina q. TP I 57. 2

entry.content: p tu/lum 3, 86, 3; 115, 227; šen-šen = q. CT 18, 36 I 21 (Ant.); gu-a-na-uz + KAS = q. MSL 3, 147, 287; CT 12, 18 II 18 (Aa; qab-lum) dazuj. in SynL LTBA 2, 1 IV 40—58 | 2, 106/24 q adamma, ana/ unlu, ašga/ugu, aštu I, dabdu, derderru, ippiru, kašušu, mithusu, sahmaštu, šagaštu, šašmu, tahažu, tamhašu, teğdu, teššu, tuquntu. Wz. murú (q q. I); aB šen.šen KH XXVIII r 2; LIH 60 I 17 (|| šen- šen-na). 1) d ma/ru I 1, ma/šu G 1a. N 1a oft; aB qa-ba-al la ma/šar Gilg. Y III 23. V 19; s. RA 46, 88ff. p. jB qab-lu la ma/šar AGH 132, 36; s. 76, 23; Gilg. III II 13; spB RA 11, 113, 18 u D. mB q šanina ina q. TP I 57. 2) q. (u q tahaža) epešu in Sch. en kämpfen: kakka q./qab-lu u t. ütt-ja la epuššu TP III 21; (ana) epes q./qab-lu u t. zB 49. IV 86; Anp. I 38; WO 1, 16, 18; 472, 9; Sg. Lie 8, 53; VAB 7, 493; AGS S. 299 (kakku); PRT S. 163b (kakku); balu epes q. kakki t. VAB 7, 168, 25; s. spB 3, 4, 17. jB amelu qa-ba-al la ipusu RA 38, 31, 8. 3) q de/ek G 3 (s. LKA 63, 10); geru G 2; nera G 4; nera G 3; baru I Dt; qa-ab-la-tim q belu II D 2b; q mararu II G 2; lawum G 2c (auch lamu qab!-lu JRAS CSpl. 35, 1); RA 45, 172, 18

aB qa-ab-rur!? Proto-Izi uny. jB qab/qa-ab-rur/ua Aa IV/3 uny. MSL 3, 143, 190; 4, 12, [5]; q petat II G 2; CT 19, 21 c 13 (Alam); E$ XK = q. 14; CT 12, 23 c I 8 (Aa); u = q. I I 31. I) jB u rugal: [ina ap]ti (Offnung) qab-r AOTAT 1, 10, 173; utuk qab-r3 3; s. STT 173, 2; AOTU 1, 288 Rs. 7; (ina) qereb q. ZA 28, 76, 47 || KAR 46, 20 (-li'); istu qab-r kamen sie heraus CT 17, 37 a 3. 6. 10; s. b I I1; ina qab-r ifneten sie die Tur 16, 9 I 10 || UET 6, 392, 12 (s. LKA 82, 12); bel qa-ab-r ArOr. 21, 388, 55. 2) sonst: C N sa qa-ab-r CT 24, 41, 66; Bilder, Lebenswassers ina qab-r usnillu LKA 144, 13; Maqlu I 108 (II 184 q temeru G); q nialu $ 4 oft; ina qab-r zum Leben rufen BWL 58, 35; s. 60, 78; TuL 78, 13 unkl. arad (hinabsteigen) qa-ab-r! AAT 90 b 20; pete qa-ab-r! Rs. 1; q emdi qa-ab-r/r ArMT 4, 1, 5. 9. aB balum [qa]-ab-r-iSu SymDav. 102, 36. q kimahhu.

nA.ina/ana qab/qa-ab-si
ON ABL 211 Rs.9;766,8;1042,8;ADD 102,4;
812 p;RMA 217 Rs.6;IAsb.701,13;s.AR 377,2;
Iraq 25,96:124,12;4,186,14 (ale);ABL 175
Rs.4;356 Rs.3 (ekalle);555,10 (TN);ina,ak
qa-ab-si mati-su 165 Rs.5;1058 Rs.8;s.Iraq 20,
43,199. d qabass(i)u.
